paper_title: Lake Sediment Sample Processing and Analysis

methods.description: Collection of lake sediment samples from various geographic locations for analysis of chironomid fossils.

steps.description: Three types of lake sediments were selected that differ in age, water content, chironomid fossil concentration, and geographic setting.
steps.searchable_summary: select and collect lake sediment samples from different geographic locations

methods.description: Preparation of sediment samples for chironomid fossil analysis by rehydrating, sieving, and sorting.

steps.description: A known weight of freeze-dried sediment was rehydrated with 10% KOH for 2 h at room temperature.
Sieved with tap water through a set of nested sieves with mesh sizes of 300, 250, 200, 150, and 100 lm.
steps.searchable_summary: sieve sediment through nested sieves with specified mesh sizes

steps.description: The material in each size fraction was rinsed twice with demineralized water to eliminate residual KOH and carbonates in tap water.
steps.searchable_summary: rinse sieved sediment fractions with demineralized water

steps.description: Head capsules were hand-picked from a Bogorov sorting tray using fine forceps under a dissecting microscope at 16-1009 magnification.
steps.searchable_summary: hand-pick head capsules using a dissecting microscope

steps.description: The head capsules were placed on preweighted cover slips and dried on a hotplate at 50°C for 1 day before re-weighing.
steps.searchable_summary: dry head capsules on a hotplate and weigh

methods.description: Analysis of the number of head capsules, their mass, and sorting time to calculate sorting time per gram dry weight of fossil chironomids.

steps.description: The number of head capsules, their mass and the time necessary to sort the chironomid fossils were measured for each fraction separately.
steps.searchable_summary: measure number, mass, and sorting time of head capsules

steps.description: Data for the different size fractions are combined to calculate cumulative values.
steps.searchable_summary: combine data from different size fractions to calculate cumulative values
